---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve. What are you trying to do that the installer doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried workarounds? Are there other approaches we could take?

## Security considerations

Does this feature touch allowlists, permissions, secrets, or agent configuration? If so, how should security be maintained?

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar tools, or anything else that helps explain the idea.
